description: Email-to-Case feature detail page — page header with breadcrumb, color bar, hero with video thumbnail, progress badge, setup step sections (Turn On Email-to-Case with toggle, Complete Required Steps with checkboxes, Unlock Advanced Functionality), resource links, and Purchase Options accordion

designContext.conversionNote:
SUPER CRITICAL: The generated React+Tailwind code MUST be converted to match the target project's technology stack and styling system.
1. Analyze the target codebase to identify: technology stack, styling approach, component patterns, and design tokens
2. Convert React syntax to the target framework/library
3. Transform all Tailwind classes to the target styling system while preserving exact visual design
4. Follow the project's existing patterns and conventions
DO NOT install any Tailwind as a dependency unless the user instructs you to do so.
designContext.styles: These styles are contained in the design: Text / Default: #181818, Text/Link: #0B5CAB, Icon / Default: #747474, 04 - Section Subtitle / Default: Font(family: "Segoe UI", style: Regular, size: 14, weight: 400, lineHeight: 21, letterSpacing: 0), 11 - Uncategorized / Default: Font(family: "Segoe UI", style: Regular, size: 42, weight: 400, lineHeight: 42, letterSpacing: 0), 03 - Body/Default: Font(family: "Segoe UI", style: Regular, size: 13, weight: 400, lineHeight: 20, letterSpacing: 0), 02 - Label / Bold: Font(family: "Segoe UI", style: Bold, size: 12, weight: 700, lineHeight: 18, letterSpacing: 0), Foundation/Gray/Neutral-100: #FFFFFF, Foundation/Gray/Neutral-80: #C9C9C9, 04 - Card / Default: Effect(type: DROP_SHADOW, color: #0000001A, offset: (0, 2), radius: 2, spread: 0), Text / White: #FFFFFF, SFGo Header: Font(family: "SF Pro Display", style: Medium, size: 20, weight: 500, lineHeight: 24, letterSpacing: 0), Icon / Brand: #0176D3, Foundation/Gray/Neutral-90: #E5E5E5, Text / Weak: #444444, Constant/White: #FFFFFF, Icon/Light: #AEAEAE, Foundation/Blue/Blue-50: #0176D3, Icon/White: #FFFFFF, 05 - Section Title / Bold: Font(family: "Segoe UI", style: Bold, size: 16, weight: 700, lineHeight: 24, letterSpacing: 0), Foundation/Blue/Blue-40: #0B5CAB, Surface-container/On-surface/2 (neutral 20): #2E2E2E, Vibrant / Blue / 90: #D8E6FE, Foundation/Gray/Neutral-95: #F3F3F3.
